title: Are Religious Conversions ACTUALLY Just UFO Encounters?

transcript.text: what if I told you that religious
conversion experiences were actually
just UFO Encounters in 2014 when
religious studies Professor Diana Pula
researched Catholic Purgatory for her
book she realized that many ancient
accounts of divine encounters look
exactly like what we now call UFO
settings take sa Francis of aisi in the
13th century on a day ironically named
the Feast of the Angels at Mount LNA in
Italy he witnessed atmospheric Sparks a
spinning disc like object and he
telepathically communicated with that
object he even received hand wounds from
rays of light shooting out of the disc
later these wounds were interpreted as
the Stigmata of Christ but Dr Pula
actually went back to the original texts
and found that Christ wasn't even in
them he was added later by the church
and the Hand wounds caused by the Light
sound exactly like radiation Burns
caused by a typical UFO encounter so
what do you think for a deeper dive
check out my full interview with Diana
Pula
